Document:
# Rule 6 – Characters should remain in universe Your character is an employee of the space station, hired by Central Command, and should behave accordingly. All characters must act as if they are 18+.
Your character cannot intentionally duplicate the name and likeness of another player's character.
Names cannot include calls for violence, or anything that violates [textlink="Rule 0" link="RuleSL0"].
Politically charged and vulgar reference names are not allowed.
Real-world topics, such as current events and real-life politics, should not be discussed.
